title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is a desktop AI agent for Mac and Windows that automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendar, and other applications. The tool enables users to organize files, schedule tasks, and connect to services like Gmail and Google Calendar through connectors.
